name: IRC_FOLLOWUP_TASKS
description: This table stores the interaction for a person in the context of a Submission, Candidate Pool, Prospect and Candidate General Profile.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. System generated value.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of entity object for which the followup task is created. Eg. PERSON_ID etc.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the entity against which the followup task is created. Eg. ORA_CANDIDATE etc.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the context against which the followup task is created. Eg. Submission, Pool, Prospect, General Profile etc.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the context object for which the followup task is created. Eg. SUBMISSION_ID, POOL_ID, PERSON_ID etc.

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date by which the followup task has to be done.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the timestamp when the followup task was marked as completed.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the followup task. Lookup type is ORA_IRC_FOLLOWUP_TASK_STATUS

columns.Name: NOTE_TEXT
columns.Comments: Stores the text for the followup task.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to per_persons table. Stores the PERSON_ID of the person who completed the followup task.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
